---
title: "Consulting"
toc: false
---

I have over 15 years of experience working with social and behavioural data — primarily self-report and behavioural, with some psychophysiological — in both academic and industry settings.

## Past and current partners

Over the years I've worked with industry partners including Boots, Chanel, CyDen Ltd, eharmony, and Vanquis, among others.

## What I can help with

- **Study design** for behavioural and survey research, including sample size calculations for standard and Bayesian designs.
- **Statistical analysis**, including hierarchical / mixed-effects models, structural equation models, and Bayesian modelling of all the above.
- **Psychometrics** — scale development, reliability and validity analysis, IRT modelling.
- **Data visualisation** and communication of statistical results to non-technical stakeholders.
- **Facial morphometrics** and related image-based measurement problems.

## Get in touch

If you think I might be useful for a project, drop me an email at [alex.l.jones@swansea.ac.uk](mailto:alex.l.jones@swansea.ac.uk). I am happy to have an initial conversation to see whether it's a good fit!
